questionHtml:
A swimmer can swim downstream at 40 km/hr and upstream at 26 km/hr. What is the speed of the swimmer in still water ?

  1. 40 km/hr

  2. 33 km/hr

  3. 42 km/hr

  4. 26 km/hr
